contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: [autopilot review] Merge & deploy 3 fix PRs: doGet conflict, auto-backfill, capoeira move cycling
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/316
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/315
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/32
  
  Details:
  Reviewed and merged 3 autopilot-generated PRs, deployed GAS changes to production, verified backfill:
  
  - **tokenomics#316** — Fix doGet function conflict: merged two competing `doGet` dispatchers from `practice_event_processing.gs` and `program_admin_endpoint.gs` into a single dispatcher so the `reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload` action is reachable via web app URL.
  - **tokenomics#315** — Auto-backfill empty credentialing-payload rows: added non-fatal try/catch at end of `parseAndProcessCredentialingLogs()` to auto-trigger `reprocessAllRowsWithEmptyPayload` after each processing run.
  - **capoeira#32** — Round-robin move cycling: replaced weighted-random move selection with round-robin (least-practiced first), removed difficulty bias UI selector, one music track per move.
  
  Also pushed the merged GAS code to Google (script `1Dj3-m_ejxYJ4UQK2zNadnqNHJIvPQfj-VYvH9_Gnap6MYRmOJhK3B0VR`), created new deployment @10 (v1.4), and verified the backfill works (22 rows already clean).
  
  ## Pull requests
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/316
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/315
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/32
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
